have h_main : filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) = List.foldr (concatMap ∘ Chapter12.okextendl) [[]] (a :: as) := by
      have h2 : List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as) = concatMap (extendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as) := by
        simp [List.foldr]
        <;> rfl
      
      have h3 : filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) = filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (concatMap (extendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) := by
        rw [h2]
      
      have h4 : filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (concatMap (extendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) = concatMap (Chapter12.okextendl a) (filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) := by
        have h5 := h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)
        simp at h5 ⊢
        <;> simpa using h5
      
      have h6 : filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) = concatMap (Chapter12.okextendl a) (filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) := by
        rw [h3, h4]
      
      have h7 : concatMap (Chapter12.okextendl a) (filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) = concatMap (Chapter12.okextendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ Chapter12.okextendl) [[]] as) := by
        have h8 : filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as) = List.foldr (concatMap ∘ Chapter12.okextendl) [[]] as := by
          apply ih
        rw [h8]
      
      have h9 : filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) = concatMap (Chapter12.okextendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ Chapter12.okextendl) [[]] as) := by
        rw [h6, h7]
      
      have h10 : List.foldr (concatMap ∘ Chapter12.okextendl) [[]] (a :: as) = concatMap (Chapter12.okextendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ Chapter12.okextendl) [[]] as) := by
        simp [List.foldr]
        <;> rfl
      
      have h11 : filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) = List.foldr (concatMap ∘ Chapter12.okextendl) [[]] (a :: as) := by
        rw [h9]
        <;> rw [h10]
        <;> rfl
      
      apply h11
    simpa [List.foldr] using h_main

have h2 : filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) =
        List.foldr (concatMap ∘ okextendl) [[]] (a :: as) := by
      simp_all [List.foldr, List.cons, Function.comp]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [concatMap, okextendl]) <;>
      (try simp_all [filter, flip, List.all, ok]) <;>
      (try simp_all [Function.comp, concatMap]) <;>

      (try simp_all [extendl, glue]) <;>
      (try simp_all [List.foldr, List.cons, Function.comp]) <;>
      (try simp_all [concatMap, okextendl]) <;>
      (try simp_all [h1]) <;>
      (try simp_all [List.foldr]) <;>
      (try simp_all [List.map, List.cons, List.nil])
      <;>
      try {

        have h5 := h1 [[[]]]
        simp_all [concatMap, okextendl, filter, flip, List.all, ok, extendl, glue]
        <;>
        try contradiction
        <;>
        try simp_all
      }
    simp_all
    <;>
    try simp_all [List.foldr, List.cons, Function.comp]
    <;>
    try simp_all [concatMap, okextendl]
    <;>
    try simp_all [filter, flip, List.all, ok]
    <;>

    <;>

    <;>
    try simp_all [List.map, List.cons, List.nil]

have h2 : List.filter (flip List.all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) = List.foldr (concatMap ∘ okextendl) [[]] (a :: as) := by
      have h3 : List.filter (flip List.all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) = List.filter (flip List.all ok) (concatMap (extendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) := by
        simp [List.foldr]
        <;> simp_all [Function.comp]
        <;> rfl
      rw [h3]
      have h4 : List.filter (flip List.all ok) (concatMap (extendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) = concatMap (okextendl a) (List.filter (flip List.all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) := by
        have h5 := h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)
        simp_all [Function.comp]
        <;> try simp_all [List.filter]
        <;> try simp_all [concatMap]
        <;> try simp_all [extendl]
        <;> try simp_all [okextendl]
        <;> try simp_all [ok]
        <;> try simp_all [flip]
        <;> try simp_all [List.all]
      rw [h4]
      have h6 : List.filter (flip List.all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as) = List.foldr (concatMap ∘ okextendl) [[]] as := by
        have h7 : List.filter (flip List.all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as) = List.filter (flip List.all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as) := rfl
        rw [h7]
        exact ih
      rw [h6]
      <;> simp [List.foldr]
      <;> simp_all [Function.comp]
      <;> rfl
    exact h2

have h2 : filter (flip all ok) (concatMap (extendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) = concatMap (okextendl a) (filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) := by
      have h2_1 := h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)
      simpa using h2_1
    have h3 : filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) = concatMap (okextendl a) (filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) := by
      simp [List.foldr] at h2 ⊢
      <;>
      (try simp_all [Function.comp, List.filter_map, List.filter_append, List.filter_cons, List.filter_nil, List.map_append, List.map_map])
      <;>
      (try aesop)
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [h1, h2, List.filter_map, List.filter_append, List.filter_cons, List.filter_nil, List.map_append, List.map_map]
          <;> aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [h1, h2, List.filter_map, List.filter_append, List.filter_cons, List.filter_nil, List.map_append, List.map_map]
          <;> aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [h1, h2, List.filter_map, List.filter_append, List.filter_cons, List.filter_nil, List.map_append, List.map_map]
          <;> aesop
        })
    have h4 : filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) = List.foldr (concatMap ∘ okextendl) [[]] (a :: as) := by
      have h4_1 : concatMap (okextendl a) (filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) = List.foldr (concatMap ∘ okextendl) [[]] (a :: as) := by
        have h4_2 : filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as) = List.foldr (concatMap ∘ okextendl) [[]] as := by
          exact ih
        rw [h4_2]
        simp [List.foldr]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [Function.comp, List.filter_map, List.filter_append, List.filter_cons, List.filter_nil, List.map_append, List.map_map])
        <;>
        (try aesop)
      rw [h3]
      rw [h4_1]
    exact h4

        filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) 
          = filter (flip all ok) (concatMap (extendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) := by
            simp [List.foldr, Function.comp]

        _ = concatMap (okextendl a) (filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) := by

        _ = concatMap (okextendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ okextendl) [[]] as) := by
          rw [ih]
        _ = List.foldr (concatMap ∘ okextendl) [[]] (a :: as) := by
          simp [List.foldr, Function.comp]
          <;> rfl
    exact h2
